description_long: This is a large, industrial-grade metal storage locker resembling a shipping container, with a dark, weathered exterior and visible rust streaks along its sides. The locker features double doors on one end, one of which is open, revealing a hazardous material warning sign and a glimpse of the interior. Three red barrels are placed adjacent to the open doors, suggesting the locker is used for storing potentially dangerous or chemical materials. The structure is robust, with reinforced paneling and heavy-duty hinges, indicating it is designed for secure, outdoor storage. The surface is matte and rough, with visible signs of wear and exposure to the elements. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing security and durability for industrial or municipal use.
description: A large, weathered metal storage locker with double doors, rust streaks, and hazardous material signage, accompanied by red barrels. Its robust, industrial design suggests secure outdoor storage for dangerous goods.
description_view_0: The top and one long side of the dark, rust-streaked metal locker are visible, with no doors or barrels in view.
description_view_1: The front of the locker is shown with both doors open, revealing a hazardous material sign and three red barrels beside the entrance.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, with the open doors and barrels partially seen at one end, highlighting the locker’s length and weathered surface.
description_view_3: The closed end of the locker is visible, showing the solid, reinforced paneling with no doors or barrels present.
